raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The gap statement ('prior policies generally execute even under demonstrable instruction ambiguity') and contribution claim ('first work to bring selective-answering machinery into robotic manipulation') are primary levers for impact; sharpening their precision and force is a plausible load-bearing interpretation of 'make this stronger'.","R1.4":"The 'first work' novelty claim is the paper's central differentiator and the most fragile sentence in the artifact; strengthening the paper plausibly requires substantiating, qualifying, or better positioning this claim against nearest prior work.","R1.6":"Prose quality and rhetorical force are directly implicated by 'make this stronger' regardless of other interpretations; sentence-level clarity, active voice, and argumentative momentum are unambiguously load-bearing here."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the primary effort go toward improving prose quality and rhetorical clarity (treating R1.6 as the sole load-bearing dimension), or toward strengthening the scientific argumentation, novelty framing, and contribution claims (treating R1.1 and R1.4 as co-load-bearing alongside R1.6)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The gap statement ('prior policies generally execute even under demonstrable instruction ambiguity') and contribution claim ('first work to bring selective-answering machinery into robotic manipulation') are primary levers for impact; sharpening their precision and force is a plausible load-bearing interpretation of 'make this stronger'.
rationale.R1.4: The 'first work' novelty claim is the paper's central differentiator and the most fragile sentence in the artifact; strengthening the paper plausibly requires substantiating, qualifying, or better positioning this claim against nearest prior work.
rationale.R1.6: Prose quality and rhetorical force are directly implicated by 'make this stronger' regardless of other interpretations; sentence-level clarity, active voice, and argumentative momentum are unambiguously load-bearing here.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the primary effort go toward improving prose quality and rhetorical clarity (treating R1.6 as the sole load-bearing dimension), or toward strengthening the scientific argumentation, novelty framing, and contribution claims (treating R1.1 and R1.4 as co-load-bearing alongside R1.6)?
